typography.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-white
typography.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white

surfaces.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10 z-50 fixed w-full top-0
surfaces.card_default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden group hover:border-violet-500/30 transition-colors duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-500 text-white font-medium px-8 py-4 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(139,92,246,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(139,92,246,0.5)] flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-white/50 text-white font-medium px-8 py-4 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.whatsapp_sticky: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] hover:bg-[#1EBE53] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300 flex items-center justify-center

animations.fade_in_up: initial opacity-0 translate-y-8, animate opacity-100 translate-y-0 duration-700 ease-out

header.structure: Fixed top navigation with glassmorphism. Left: Logo. Center: Links (hidden on mobile). Right: Primary CTA 'Discuss Your Project' & Mobile Menu toggle.
header.behavior: Transparent at top, backdrop-blur-xl on scroll.

hero.structure: Full height relative section. Background: media.images.hero_background with bg-black/60 overlay and from-black/90 via-black/40 to-black/10 gradient. Content: Overline 'PREMIUM ARCHITECTURAL ART', Massive H1 'Transforming Spaces into Masterpieces', Subtitle text. CTAs: 'Get Proposal on WhatsApp' (Primary) and 'View Portfolio' (Secondary).
hero.layout: Flex column, vertically centered, left aligned or centered based on preference. Let's use left-aligned for an editorial look.

services.structure: Bento Grid Mode A. 'Custom Sculptures' gets col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2 (Hero size), others take col-span-4. Each card contains its respective image from media.images.services with group-hover:scale-105 zoom effect. Content overlay with gradient bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 to-transparent. Cards must have 1px border-white/10.

capability_about.structure: Split section: Left side Typography (H2 + body) detailing 'Why Artonauts', Right side split into stats (e.g., '500+ Installations', '10+ Years') and image media.images.about_workshop. Use texture_background as subtle overlay.

process.structure: Vertical timeline with a glowing left border (border-l-2 border-violet-900/50). Nodes are metallic circles (bg-black border border-violet-500). Steps: Consultation, Concept, Design, Fabrication, Finishing, Delivery/Installation.

portfolio.structure: Masonry grid or CSS columns layout of media.images.portfolio_gallery and other service images. Hover overlays showing 'View Project'.

trust.structure: Logo marquee of high-end clients or subtle text testimonials wrapped in glassmorphism cards.

faq.structure: Shadcn Accordion component. Dark theme overrides: bg-transparent border-white/10 text-white.

contact.structure: Split section. Left side: Direct contact info, WhatsApp CTA, 'Click-to-Call'. Right side: Lead capture form inside a card_default container. Form inputs: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-violet-500 text-white.

footer.structure: Massive bottom padding. Top area: large 'ARTONAUTS' text. Grid of links, social icons (Instagram, Facebook). Bottom area: Copyright, terms.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a premium luxury marketing site. Strict adherence to the Dark Theme and 'Cosmic Violet / Metallic Silver' palette is mandatory.
Use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons. Install via: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`.
Do NOT use Inter for headings. Use 'Outfit'. You may need to add it via Google Fonts.
All cards must have a 1px border border-white/5 or border-white/10 to stand out against the black background.
Ensure the hero background image has a dark gradient overlay so the white text is readable.
Implement the 'Sticky WhatsApp Button' globally so it sits at the bottom right corner.
The Services section MUST use the specified Bento Grid layout with varying spans for visual interest.
The Contact Form inputs should not have a white background. Use bg-[#0A0A0A] or bg-transparent with white/10 borders.
Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs).
